text.title: Methodologies Detail Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Authoring detail page for business-model-research
example.note: Source: knowledge/pro/research/researcher/business-model-research/AGENTS.md + content/*.xml. Extracted: 6 rules, 4 antipatterns, 6-step procedure, 1 worked example, 6-leaf decision tree. Rendered into canonical 12-section template. Audit pass: 12/12 checks pass. Published at docs.faion.net/pro/research/business-model-research/.
